schema_version.description: Version of the DITTO schema set this document conforms to

id.description: Stable identifier for a single provider run

work_item_id.description: Stable identifier for a work item

provider.description: Provider host that executes the run

entrypoint.description: How the provider was invoked, e.g., "codex exec" or "claude code"

model_reported.description: Model name as reported by the provider; null if unknown

profile.description: Execution profile that determines permission and network policy

cwd.description: Repo-relative working directory of the run

prompt_path.description: Path to the prompt/context packet handed to the provider

head.description: Commit sha at the moment of capture

dirty.description: Whether the working tree has uncommitted changes

git_before.description: Snapshot of git state taken before or after a run

head.description: Commit sha at the moment of capture

dirty.description: Whether the working tree has uncommitted changes

git_after.description: Snapshot of git state taken before or after a run

items.description: Repo-relative path; absolute paths and .. traversal are rejected

stdout_path.description: Repo-relative path; absolute paths and .. traversal are rejected

stderr_path.description: Repo-relative path; absolute paths and .. traversal are rejected

diff_path.description: Repo-relative path; absolute paths and .. traversal are rejected

worktree_path.description: Repo-relative path to the per-run git worktree, set when profile=isolated

exit_code.description: null if the provider was killed or crashed

started_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset

ended_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset

command.description: Exact command executed to verify outcome

output_path.description: Where the verification output is stored as evidence

items.description: A single verification attempt performed inside or after the run

unverified.description: Items the run could not verify and why, one entry per item

run-manifest.description: Authoritative record of a single provider invocation
